_comment: VibeOS Plugin Architecture Rules — Example configurations for common frameworks
_usage: Copy this file to scripts/architecture-rules.json and customize for your project

rules.name: router-isolation
rules.message: Routers cannot import from other routers — use shared services

rules.name: api-purity
rules.message: Router endpoints must not perform direct I/O — delegate to services

rules.name: dependency-injection
rules.message: Service functions should accept db session via dependency injection

rules.name: no-raw-sql
rules.message: Use SQLAlchemy ORM or parameterized queries

rules.name: orm-enforcement
rules.message: Use Django ORM — avoid raw SQL

rules.name: view-separation
rules.message: Views should delegate data operations to services or managers

rules.name: controller-separation
rules.message: Route handlers should delegate data access to controllers/services

rules.name: async-patterns
rules.message: Use async/await instead of .then() chains in route handlers

rules.name: service-purity
rules.message: Controllers should not access repositories directly — use services

rules.name: no-raw-sql
rules.message: Use parameterized queries, not string formatting for SQL
